name: Can I get workers comp if I had a bad back before getting hurt at work in West Valley City?
description: Yes, work aggravation of pre-existing injuries qualifies; doctor determines via impairment rating.[1]

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp if I had a bad back before getting hurt at work in West Valley City?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, work aggravation of pre-existing injuries qualifies; doctor determines via impairment rating.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, aggravation of pre-existing conditions is often covered under Utah and Idaho workers' comp if work caused worsening.[1][3] Doctors assess impairment ratings for benefits.[1] Key factors: Prove work incident aggravated it; permanent partial disability pays based on stability and rating.[1] Provide full medical history to physician; gather prior records.[1] Legal help ensures insurer doesn't deny based on priors.[1]
